title: Palestine / HAIDER ABDELSHAFI - last interview
description:
HAIDER ABDELSHAFI, 1919-2007, "Peace not during my Lifetime", his last interview with Weltwoche correspondent Pierre Heumann at his office in Gaza City, 4 May 2005.

DaVaz productions
interview: PIERRE HEUMANN
camera: JÜRG DA VAZ
